simulation_contract_record.scope: Synthetic benchmark comparison for one declared resource-accounting fixture.
simulation_contract_record.fidelity_standard: Benchmark fixture fidelity with approximation limits declared.
simulation_contract_record.temporal_semantics: Offline batch fixture with no deployment timing semantics.
input_assumptions: Quality is not measured outside the fixture boundary.
approximation_liberties: Uses fixture records instead of a real workload.
Uses declared outcome states instead of measured model quality.
instrumentation_effects: The validator can only inspect fields encoded in the fixture.
simulation_contract_record.observed_result_boundary: A broader deployment comparison is downgraded to benchmark-record discipline.
simulation_contract_record.failure_behavior: Requested deployment transfer is downgraded and residualized.
non_claims: does not promote chapter core support state
does not prove physical deployment behavior
